footer.tagline: Find trusted support services for refugees and displaced people in Armenia.

home.subtitle: Thousands of refugees in Armenia are seeking housing, healthcare, legal aid, and more. Find trusted support services near you - confidential, free, and easy to access.
home.searchPlaceholder: Search for housing, healthcare, legal aid...
home.browseTopicsSubtitle: Find the help you need across different categories
home.latestServicesSubtitle: Recently added support services in your area
home.ctaTitle: Haven't found the right service yet?

joinNetwork.title: Join our network of service providers
joinNetwork.description: Are you an organization providing support services to refugees? Register to post your services on our platform and help connect those in need with the support you offer.

services.title: Explore services
services.subtitle: Browse a wide range of support services including healthcare, legal advice, housing, education, and more. All services are verified and offered by reliable organizations working to support refugees.
services.searchPlaceholder: Search for housing, healthcare, legal aid...
services.noResults: No services found matching your criteria

serviceDetail.notFoundText: This service is no longer available or the link is incorrect.

about.title: About RefugeeSupport.am
about.intro: RefugeeSupport.am is a platform connecting refugees and displaced people in Armenia with verified support services provided by trusted organisations.
about.missionText: We believe everyone deserves access to essential services - housing, healthcare, legal aid, education, and more. Our platform makes it easy to find, compare, and connect with the right support.
about.step1Text: Find services by topic, region, or keyword. Use the map to explore what's available near you.
about.step2Text: View detailed service information and contact the providing organisation directly.
about.step3Text: Can't find what you need? Submit a need report and we'll connect you with available resources.
about.builtBy: Built with care by Code for Romania, in partnership with local organisations across Armenia.
about.ctaTitle: Haven't found the right service yet?

joinNetworkPage.title: Join the network
joinNetworkPage.subtitle: Are you an organisation providing support services to refugees in Armenia? Register to join and we will contact you to onboard your team.
joinNetworkPage.formSubtitle: Tell us about your organisation and support services. Our admin team will review your request and reach out.
joinNetworkPage.success: Request received. We will contact you at the email address provided.
joinNetworkPage.successTitle: Thank you for joining the network
joinNetworkPage.successText: Thanks for being part of this initiative. Our team will review your request and contact you soon with the next steps.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number.
errors.servicesDescriptionTooShort: Service description should be at least 10 characters.

reportNeedPage.title: Report a need
reportNeedPage.subtitle: Tell us what your needs are and you will be contacted and provided with the available resources.
reportNeedPage.infoBox: If you have already submitted a need report and have not been contacted, call +374 00 000 000 or email help@example.com.
reportNeedPage.formSubtitle: Let us know your needs, and we will reach out to connect you with the most appropriate services available.
reportNeedPage.contactMethod: How would you like to be contacted?
reportNeedPage.successText: Your need has been submitted. We will review it and connect you with available support services.

errors.contactEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.contactPhoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number.
errors.submitFallback: Unable to submit your request right now. Please try again.

auth.loginSubtitle: Use your organisation account to manage services, review reported needs, and keep support information up to date.
auth.loginPanelTitle: Coordinate support without leaving the platform behind.
auth.loginPanelBody: Stay connected to the same RefugeeSupport.am experience while you access the tools your team uses to respond quickly and confidently.

needs.title: Need reports
needs.submitSuccess: Thank you. Your need has been submitted.

joinNetwork.title: Join the network
joinNetwork.subtitle: Are you an organisation providing support services to refugees in Armenia? Join our network to reach the people who need you.
joinNetwork.benefit1Text: Your services will be listed on our platform, making them discoverable to thousands of refugees and displaced people.
joinNetwork.benefit2Text: Use our dashboard to add, update, and manage your service listings. Track assigned need reports.
joinNetwork.benefit3Text: Receive need report assignments and connect directly with people who need your support.
joinNetwork.ctaText: To join the network, contact us at the email address below. We will set up your organisation account and provide access credentials.

notifyCard.title: Get notified about similar services
notifyCard.description: Want to be notified when new services matching your search criteria are added?
notifyCard.successBody: We'll email you whenever a new service matching these filters is added. You can unsubscribe anytime.
notifyCard.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
notifyCard.errorFallback: Unable to subscribe right now. Please try again.

unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe
unsubscribe.successBody: You will no longer receive emails about new services.
unsubscribe.errorBody: This unsubscribe link is invalid or has already been used.
unsubscribe.missingToken: This unsubscribe link is missing its token.
